title: Senior Financial Analyst - MCX International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - MCX International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
MCX International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MCX International Enterprises:
MCX International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
